Tripura Polytechnic Entrance Examination.official_note: Tripura polytechnic/diploma admission is via DEEET (Diploma Engineering Entrance Examination of Tripura), conducted by the Directorate of Higher Education, Govt of Tripura. The technical-education section (highereducation.tripura.gov.in/DHE/technical-education) and admission portal (deeet.tripura.gov.in) publish the DEEET provisional common merit list PDF (this URL). The PDF loaded (653KB) but is a per-candidate ranked merit list, not a college/branch opening-closing-rank cutoff table, and its compressed stream was not text-extractable.

Uttar Pradesh Common Nursing Entrance Te.official_note: Official CNET (Common Nursing Entrance Test) page of Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University UP. Confirmed it is the CNET exam page; results, merit list and counselling are served through the linked candidate portal (abvmucet26.co.in / abvmucet25.co.in) which is behind a login, so no static cutoff table is exposed.

Uttarakhand Joint Entrance Examination P.official_note: Official UBTER JEEP Admission and eCounselling portal (Uttarakhand Board of Technical Education) for polytechnic admissions. Verified live: lists seat-matrix PDFs (Group-E engineering, Group-P pharmacy, Group-A lateral entry) and the counselling schedule. Seat allotment results / cutoff ranks are behind candidate login, so no static cutoff table is published.

Uttarakhand Nursing Entrance Exam.official_note: Hemwati Nandan Bahuguna Uttarakhand Medical Education University (HNBUMU), Dehradun conducts the Uttarakhand Nursing entrance exam. Homepage verified live and links the 'Uttarakhand Nursing/Paramedical Entrance Examinations 2026' counselling portal (emsecure.in/HNBUMUNursing2026) and nursing_courses.html. Merit list / results are released through the login portal, so no static cutoff table is exposed.

Uttarakhand Paramedical Entrance Exam.official_note: HNBUMU (hnbumu.ac.in) conducts the combined Uttarakhand Nursing/Paramedical entrance exam; the paramedical_courses page and the 'Uttarakhand Nursing/Paramedical Entrance Examinations 2026' portal (emsecure.in/HNBUMUNursing2026) are the official channels. Merit list / counselling are behind the login portal; no static cutoff table is published.

Uttarakhand State Entrance Examination.official_note: Uttarakhand Technical University (UTU/UKTech) site. The prior link /en/page/admissions returns a 'Global Page Error' (dead); replaced with the working domain root. UKSEE was scrapped in 2023 and B.Tech 1st-year admission is now via JEE Main; UTU runs counselling/seat allotment (registration started 28 May 2026) through the portal at uktech.ac.in, behind login. already_has_data was true (kollegeapply), so no extraction attempted.

West Bengal Bachelor of Arts Admission.official_note: West Bengal Centralised Admission Portal (WBCAP) run by the West Bengal State Council of Higher Education — single-window UG admission (including BA) to govt/govt-aided colleges. 1st merit list published 9 June 2026. Merit lists/cutoffs are college-wise and viewable only after selecting a college and logging in, so no consolidated static cutoff table is exposed.
